# GitHub Copilot Instructions

Read `AGENTS.md` before making changes.

Then read `docs/ai/context.md` for the short product/design/Linear briefing.

## Repo guidance

- This is a TanStack Start, React, Tailwind CSS, and Supabase app.
- Keep edits small and aligned with the existing patterns.
- Do not hand-edit `src/routeTree.gen.ts`.
- Do not commit `.env`.
- Follow `Design.md` for UI work.
- Prefer `npm run build` for validation.
